designConstraints: Must use 8px spacing unit grid system with scale values [4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64]px
Background must use background-primary token (deep-navy #0F172A) consistent with all other app screens
Form sections and setting groups must use surface-primary (navy-surface #1E293B) cards with elevation level 1 shadow (0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3))
Input fields must use surface-input (deep-navy #0F172A) background with slate-border (#334155) default border and gold-amber (#F59E0B) focus border
Primary Save/Done CTA must use cta-primary (gold-amber #F59E0B) background with text-on-cta (deep-navy #0F172A) text, matching dashboard and add-expense CTA patterns
Maximum 3 levels of visual hierarchy: page title → section headers → field labels
Content max width of 1280px with 24px grid margin; single-column layout for settings form fields
Border radius must follow token scale: small=6px for inputs, medium=10px for cards/sections, pill=9999px for toggle/chip elements
TopBar shared component must be included for consistency with dashboard, add-expense, and spending-insights pages
NavigationTabs shared component must be included at bottom for consistent app-wide navigation
Minimum touch target size of 44×44px for all interactive controls including toggles, selects, and buttons
Desktop-first layout at 1440px viewport with tablet support at 768px breakpoint
Typography must use DM Sans (display) for headings and section labels, DM Mono (body) for input values and data fields
Focus ring must use gold-amber (#F59E0B) with 2px width and 2px offset on all interactive elements
Destructive or error states must use coral-error (#F87171) for border-error and error tokens
referencePatterns: Settings drawer pattern from existing /settings screen — adapt drawer content into full-page layout with identical field groupings
Card-based section grouping pattern from Dashboard BudgetSummaryCard — use navy-surface cards to visually separate profile, preferences, and budget setting sections
Chip/selector row pattern from Add Expense PaymentMethodChipRow and CategoryChipGrid — apply to currency selector and preference toggles
Full-width primary CTA button pattern from Add Expense SaveExpenseButton — replicate for Save/Done action at bottom of form
TopBar with back navigation pattern from Add Expense screen — include back arrow navigating to dashboard
Form input field pattern from Add Expense NoteInput and AmountHeroInput — consistent input styling with surface-input background and slate-border
Section header typography pattern using heading-2 (DM Sans 16px/600) for group labels and label role (DM Mono 12px/500) for field labels
BudgetStatusBadge / SpendingDiffBadge inline badge pattern for displaying current saved values next to editable fields
accessibilityRequirements: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for all text — silver-text (#CBD5E1) on deep-navy (#0F172A) achieves approximately 10.6:1; verify all text/background combinations
All form inputs must have associated visible labels or aria-label attributes; placeholder text alone is not sufficient
Save/Done button must have descriptive aria-label indicating action and destination (e.g., 'Save settings and return to Dashboard')
All toggle switches must expose role='switch' with aria-checked state and accessible name
Currency selector and preference dropdowns must be keyboard navigable with arrow key support and announce selected value to screen readers
Focus order must follow logical top-to-bottom, left-to-right reading order through all form sections
Focus ring must be visible on all interactive elements using gold-amber (#F59E0B) 2px outline with 2px offset
Error states for invalid inputs must use aria-invalid='true' and aria-describedby pointing to error message element styled with coral-error (#F87171)
Section groupings must use fieldset and legend elements or equivalent ARIA landmark roles (role='group' with aria-labelledby) for screen reader navigation
Page must include a skip-to-main-content link for keyboard users bypassing TopBar navigation
All interactive elements must meet minimum 44×44px touch target requirement
Success confirmation after save must be announced via aria-live='polite' region (toast or inline message)
dataModelDependencies: UserSettings entity — fields: id, currency, default_monthly_budget, locale, created_at, updated_at (from user-settings model, db_table: user_settings)
GET /api/settings endpoint — fetch current user settings for pre-filling profile and preference fields on page load
PUT /api/settings endpoint — persist updated currency preference, default monthly budget, and locale on Save/Done action
Budget entity — fields: amount, currency, month, year — referenced for displaying and editing default monthly budget context
GET /api/budgets endpoint — may be needed to display current month budget alongside default budget setting for user context
